message: Commute Analytics view with Charts, fix extension entitlements, home screen widget
Home screen widget: commute ETA, small + medium sizes, App Group shared data
Live Activities: Dynamic Island, Lock Screen, activity lifecycle, orphan cleanup
CarPlay: add dashboard widget, Now Playing integration, media steering wheel controls
add per-commute route preview skip option
enable App Group entitlement for extension data sharing
sync workflow: increase to 50 commits, filter internal tool mentions
filter internal tool mentions from website activity sync
fix: use correct GitHub email in sync workflow
fix: sync workflow targets master branch on website repo
add GitHub Action to sync TODO and commit activity to website repo
fix carplay map: follow user location on connect, traffic enabled, proper camera on init
carplay overhaul: raw numeric values for ETA/distance, maneuvers only rebuild on instruction change, no string parsing
fix carplay: set map view controller as window rootViewController on connect per Apple docs
update TODO with all completed work from this session
fix: compass shows device magnetometer heading (direction phone faces), not GPS course
fix: compass shows cardinal direction (N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW) based on heading, no rotation
fix: use saved travel time from route planning for ETA instead of 30mph assumption
save turn-by-turn steps at route planning time, use them directly during navigation instead of generating from polyline
debug: add trace logging throughout saved route navigation flow
rewrite NavigationEngine from scratch: unified NavStep model, MKRoute is just an adapter, no dual paths
fix: off-route grace period, wider threshold, custom routes don't trigger Apple reroute
custom routing: saved routes now use own turn-by-turn logic, fully independent from Apple Maps
fix: free-look mode during nav — pan/pinch pauses auto-follow, recenter button to resume
fix: remove duplicate didDisconnect overload and nil coalescing warning in CarPlay
fix: saved route polyline now used for map rendering and position tracking, not just route selection
fix: remove duplicate puck annotation, use single MKUserLocation puck
carplay: swap CPListTemplate to CPMapTemplate with full map view, maneuver display, zoom controls
fix: saved routes now used for navigation — picks closest Apple Maps route to saved polyline
update TODO: route preview, haptics, Siri, route preferences all done
add route preview: full-screen map with ETA, distance, alternates before nav starts
add Siri Shortcuts: 'Start my commute' and 'Check commute ETA' via App Intents
add haptic feedback system: 5 levels, per-event intensity, wired into nav engine and UI
add route preferences: toll and highway avoidance (global + per-commute)
setup: add App Group entitlement for extension data sharing
update TODO: all on-device testing bugs fixed
fix: remove weak self from struct closures (HomeView is a value type)
fix: off-route detection and smart rerouting that avoids U-turns
fix: stop background location tracking when not navigating
fix: smooth puck movement and rotation with 0.8s easeOut animation
fix: snap puck to route polyline so it stays centered on the route line
fix: compass uses route-based bearing for stable cardinal direction
fix: speedometer color changes based on estimated speed limit from road type
fix: enable traffic conditions on map
re-enable CarPlay navigation entitlement (approved by Apple, key: carplay-maps)
add on-device testing bugs: compass, route line, puck jitter, speedometer, off-route handling, traffic
reframe implementation plan as living constitution, not static bible
add design philosophy: routing config belongs in context, not main settings
make Now Playing mini-bar toggleable in settings
